---
id: initialize-payment
title: "Initialize payment"
description: "Initialize payment within given contract."
sidebar_label: "Initialize payment"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-psd2/home-credit-psd-2-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Initialize payment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/my/contracts/{contractNumber}/payments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Initialize payment within given contract.

Possible error codes explanation:
| Error status code | Code         | Explanation                                                                      |
| --- | ---                        | ---                                                                              |
| 400 | INVALID_REQUEST            | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.)  |
| 404 | RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND         | Resource could not be found                                                      |
| 422 | IN_RECOVERY                | Customer is in collection                                                        |
| 422 | NOT_SUFFICIENT_BALANCE     | Customer does not have sufficient balance                                        |
| 422 | NO_VERIFIED_MOBILE         | Customer does not have verified mobile                                           |
| 422 | UNSUPPORTED_CONTRACT_TYPE  | Not supported for given contract type                                            |
| 422 | UNSUPPORTED_CONTRACT_STATE | Not supported for current contract state                                         |
| 422 | NOT_AVAILABLE              | Operation is not available  (some criteria is not met)                           |
| 500 | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR      | Internal failure                                                                 |

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"contractNumber","in":"path","description":"Number of the contract client wants to make a payment from.","required":true,"example":"123456789","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json; charset=utf-8":{"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"bankAccount":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["IBAN","NATIONAL"],"description":"Account type"}},"required":["type"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"iban":{"type":"object","properties":{"iban":{"type":"string","description":"Account number in IBAN format"}},"required":["iban"],"description":"Account number in IBAN format"}},"required":["iban"]},{"properties":{"national":{"type":"object","properties":{"prefix":{"type":"string","description":"Account number prefix. For domestic accounts, this will be specified in national format."},"accountNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Account number. For domestic accounts, this will be specified in national format."},"bankCode":{"type":"string","description":"For domestic accounts, bank code in national format"}},"required":["accountNumber","bankCode"],"description":"Account number, for domestic accounts this will be specified in national format."}},"required":["national"]}],"description":"Customer's account number"},"amount":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in major currency unit (two digits used after decimal separator which is '.')"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency.   id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Payment initialized","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["paymentId"],"properties":{"paymentId":{"type":"string","example":"A11223344","description":"Payment request ID"},"key":{"type":"string","example":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","description":"Payment authorization key (it is known only to application)"}},"title":"PaymentInitializationResponse"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"paymentId":"A11223344","key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3"}}}}}},"201":{"description":"Payment initialized","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["paymentId"],"properties":{"paymentId":{"type":"string","example":"A11223344","description":"Payment request ID"},"key":{"type":"string","example":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","description":"Payment authorization key (it is known only to application)"}},"title":"PaymentInitializationResponse"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"paymentId":"A11223344","key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3"}}}}}},"404":{"description":"Not internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","example":"Some error/validation message description","description":"human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","example":"personalBirthNumber","description":"json path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","example":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4","description":"internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"title":"Error"}}},"title":"Errors"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"ERR_1000_SOME_ERROR_CODE","message":"Some error/validation message description","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"personalBirthNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
